integration_validation_v2.evidence: Red-team risks converted to enforced checks: explicit keypoint schema (validate_keypoints pose.rs:1005), deferred/blocked persisted as real rows with mandatory non-empty reason (pose.rs:3227-3249, PoseDeferredStatus), versions recorded+asserted (detector_model_version), capability gate not bypassed (validate_engine_comfyui_grant_ref comfy.rs:732-759). Capability denial proven against real kernel EventLedger (tests/atelier_comfy_tests.rs:110-227; tests/atelier_pose_deferred_feature_tests.rs:57-102).

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-121 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] Pose Red-Team Schema Status And Tool-Version Guards -- Convert schema/status/tool-version risks into checks: explicit keypoint schemas
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Pose Red-Team Schema Status And Tool-Version Guards
scope.summary: MT-121 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] Pose Red-Team Schema Status And Tool-Version Guards -- Convert schema/status/tool-version risks into checks: explicit keypoint schemas, deferred stays deferred, blocked stays blocked, versions recorded, capability gates not bypassed.
